sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) Is Increasing Its Dividend To CA$1.67
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) is set to increase its quarterly dividend to CA$1.67, payable on February 26th. While the yield remains at 3.5%, the dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 56% expected to drop to 44% in the future. The company has a strong history of consistent dividend growth and is projected to see a 40.3% rise in EPS over the next three years, making it an attractive option for income-focused investors.

feed.title: TVA Offers Tips To Save On Energy Bills During Extreme Heat
feed.summary: The Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) has provided tips to help consumers save on energy bills during a period of extreme heat, with power demand expected to peak at 33,000 megawatts. Recommendations include cleaning HVAC filters, adjusting thermostats, using ceiling fans, cooking outdoors, and running large appliances at night. The TVA also offers rebates for HVAC tune-ups and unit replacements to encourage energy efficiency.

feed.title: Amazon is selling a ‘sturdy’ rolling storage cart that can hold so much for just $32
feed.summary: Amazon is offering a highly-rated Amazon Basics 3-Tier Storage Cart for just $32, which boasts over 14,000 reviews and a 4.6 rating. The cart is praised for its versatility, sturdiness, and ease of assembly, making it suitable for various uses in any room. It comes in four colors, with each shelf capable of holding up to 44 pounds, offering a flexible and attractive storage solution.

feed.title: Adirondack chairs sold at Lowe’s, Home Depot recalled over fall risk
feed.summary: Thousands of Adirondack patio chairs sold at Lowe's and Home Depot are being recalled due to a fall risk. The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) reports that these chairs can crack and collapse. Consumers are advised to stop using the chairs immediately and return them for a full refund.

feed.title: CFO of $3B automation firm Ryan McLeod to lead CAE's finances
feed.summary: CAE (NYSE: CAE) has announced the appointment of Ryan McLeod as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective February 23, 2026. McLeod, who previously served as CFO of ATS Corporation, a $3 billion automation solutions leader, will lead CAE's global finance organization. He will work with interim CFO Constantino Malatesta to ensure a smooth transition.

feed.title: 2026 Sustainability Trends; AI’s Electricity Challenge; and Scaling Businesses for Success
feed.summary: S&P Global's daily update highlights key insights for January 19, 2026, focusing on three main areas: the top 10 sustainability trends for 2026, examining how the energy transition will intersect with evolving political landscapes; the growing electricity demand posed by AI data centers and its implications for infrastructure and energy costs; and strategies for scaling businesses for long-term success in private markets, as discussed by Mark Sotir of Equity Group Investments. The update also includes "in case you missed it" notes on Indian securitization, critical mineral agreements, and crude carrier spot rates, alongside upcoming webinars for January 2026.

feed.title: Eversource Reminds Customers Help Is Available With Energy Bills
feed.summary: Eversource is reminding its customers about various programs available to help manage their energy bills, including financial assistance, flexible payment plans, and energy efficiency initiatives. The company is hosting free in-person events on January 20 and 22 where customer care representatives will provide details on these options, such as the Connecticut Energy Assistance Program and Matching Payment Program, and assist with applications. Customers are encouraged to enroll in payment plans or assistance programs to avoid service shutoffs and reduce energy costs.

feed.title: Public Storage Is Quietly Printing Money – But Is This Stock Still Worth Your Cash?
feed.summary: This article examines Public Storage (PSA), a self-storage REIT, despite its seemingly "boring" image. It delves into the company's strong business model driven by consistent demand for storage, its presence in various online content, and its position as a dividend-paying, long-term stability play for investors. The article concludes that while not a high-growth "meme stock," Public Storage represents a sound investment for those seeking steady cash flow and defensive characteristics, provided the entry price is considered carefully.

feed.title: Microchip Expands PolarFire® FPGA Smart Embedded Video Ecosystem with New SDI IP Cores and Quad CoaXPress™ Bridge Kit
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (Nasdaq: MCHP) has expanded its PolarFire® FPGA smart embedded video ecosystem with new SDI IP cores and a quad CoaXPress™ bridge kit. These solution stacks are designed to streamline development for low-power, high-bandwidth video connectivity in medical, industrial, and robotic vision applications. The offerings include SDI Receive and Transmit IP cores and a quad CoaXPress board, enabling high-resolution video transport and addressing challenges like component obsolescence.

feed.title: New Microchip video kit targets sharper medical and industrial imaging
feed.summary: Microchip (MCHP) has expanded its PolarFire FPGA smart embedded video ecosystem with new SDI Rx/Tx IP cores and a quad CoaXPress (CXP) bridge board. This aims to enable direct SLVS-EC to CXP 2.0 bridging without third-party IP, supporting 4K/8K formats and targeting low-power, fanless medical, industrial, and robotic vision systems. The solution stacks, leveraging PolarFire FPGAs, are designed to improve energy efficiency, reduce BOM costs, and accelerate time to market for OEMs.

feed.title: What to Expect From Humana’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
feed.summary: Humana Inc. (HUM) is projected to announce its fiscal Q4 2025 earnings on February 11, with analysts expecting a significant decline in EPS to a loss of $4.01 per share due to challenges in its Medicare Advantage business, including lower quality ratings and higher medical costs. Despite past earnings beats and an expected profit increase for fiscal 2025, the company's shares have underperformed the S&P 500 and the S&P Health Care Services ETF over the past year. Wall Street analysts maintain a “Moderate Buy” rating, with a mean price target indicating a modest upside.

feed.title: What You Need To Know Ahead of Baxter International's Earnings Release
feed.summary: Baxter International (BAX) is set to release its fiscal Q4 2025 earnings, with analysts projecting an adjusted EPS of $0.53, an 8.6% decline year-over-year. Despite beating Q3 2025 earnings estimates, the company's shares fell due to missed revenue and lowered full-year guidance, partly attributed to hurricane disruptions and concerns over its infusion pump portfolio. Analysts currently hold a cautious "Hold" rating on BAX, with an average price target suggesting a modest upside.

feed.title: Apple Inc. (AAPL) Faces Added Uncertainty from Regulatory Scrutiny in India
feed.summary: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is facing increased regulatory scrutiny in India regarding its App Store policies, with the potential for penalties up to $38 billion if India's global revenue-based penalty rules are applied. Despite this, analysts maintain a largely positive outlook on Apple, with a consensus "Buy" rating and a median price target suggesting a 16% upside. The Competition Commission of India has issued a final warning to Apple to respond to concerns, while Evercore ISI recently reiterated Apple as its "Top Pick" with an increased price target.

feed.title: Tonix Pharmaceuticals Announces Program Updates on Phase 2/3-Ready Long-Acting Monoclonal Antibody (mAb) Designed for Seasonal Prevention of Lyme Disease (TNX-4800)
feed.summary: Tonix Pharmaceuticals announced updates on TNX-4800, a long-acting monoclonal antibody designed for the seasonal prevention of Lyme disease. The company plans to meet with the FDA in 2026 to discuss Phase 2/3 development options, including a controlled human infection model study, and expects to have investigational product available by early 2027. TNX-4800 aims to provide immediate, seasonal protection against Lyme disease, offering an alternative to traditional vaccines with potential benefits for millions in endemic regions.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace: High Quality With No Margin Of Safety (NYSE:HWM)
feed.summary: The article rates Howmet Aerospace (HWM) a "Hold" despite its genuine business quality, citing a limited margin of safety due to its current price. The key factor for the stock's future performance is whether its free cash flow conversion remains durable, especially if receivables programs expand and working capital continues to consume cash over multiple quarters.
